tool_args.label: VN-11 Brooklyn Approach Reconstruction at Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: Project VN-11, the Brooklyn Approach Reconstruction at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge, was completed in June, six months ahead of the original schedule as part of the Moving New York Forward Initiative.

payload.description: Brooklyn Approach Reconstruction at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge. Completed six months ahead of schedule as part of the Moving New York Forward Initiative. Part of seven completions with total value of $110.7 million.

tool_args.label: VN-32/VN-49X Structural Steel Repairs and Painting at Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction and Development has one (1) procurement totaling $7.5 million for TBTA that is a modification to the contract for Structural Steel Repairs and Painting at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge with Ahern Painting Contractors, Inc.

payload.project_name: Structural Steel Repairs and Painting at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
payload.description: Modification to contract VN-32/VN-49X for additional structural steel quantities and necessary fire standpipe repair work on the main span of the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge. Contract with Ahern Painting Contractors, Inc. Value $7,500,000.

tool_args.label: June 2021 paid vehicle traffic
tool_args.raw_text: In the month, 27.8 million paid vehicles crossed B&T facilities compared to 20.0 million in June 2020, an increase of 39.1%.

tool_args.label: July 2021 paid vehicle traffic
tool_args.raw_text: In the month, 28.0 million paid vehicles crossed B&T facilities compared to 23.3 million in July 2020, an increase of 20.2%.

tool_args.label: 2021 total collision rate Safety Report May 2021
tool_args.raw_text: the 2021 total collision rate was 3.9 per million vehicles or 39% better than in 2019 and 33% better than in 2020

tool_args.label: TBTA support to mass transit June 2021
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA's support to mass transit was $604 million, which was $432 million better than the Adopted Budget.

tool_args.label: TBTA toll revenue June 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Toll revenue was $973 million, which was $401 million better than budgeted.

tool_args.label: TBTA total expenses June 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Total expenses were $216 million, which was $28 million or 11% below budget.

tool_args.label: May 2021 paid vehicle traffic vs May 2019
tool_args.raw_text: paid vehicle traffic decreased by 26.8 million vehicles or 5.0% as compared to the same month in 2019 and that it was 79% higher than in May 2020.

payload.comparison: 5.0% decrease vs May 2019; 79% higher than May 2020

comparison_normalized.raw_text: 5.0% decrease vs May 2019; 79% higher than May 2020

tool_args.label: 2021 collision with injuries rate Safety Report May 2021
tool_args.raw_text: The 2021 collision with injuries rate was 0.62 per million vehicles or 31% better than in both 2019 and 2020.

tool_args.label: Employee lost time injury rate May 2021 Safety Report
tool_args.raw_text: The employee lost time injury rate was 6.5 incidents per 200,000 work hours or a 20% increase as compared to the same period in 2020.

tool_args.label: VN-10 Anchorage & Piers Rehabilitation and Sealing completed
tool_args.raw_text: VN-10 D701VN10 Anchorage & Piers Rehabilitation and Sealing - Completed one month earlier than anticipated. Completion Date actual Apr-21.

payload.description: VN-10 Anchorage & Piers Rehabilitation and Sealing at Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge completed one month earlier than anticipated. Budget $49.0 million.

tool_args.label: NYC Triathlon - Henry Hudson Bridge closure July 2021
tool_args.raw_text: on July 11, 2021, TBTA helped the region return to endurance racing events by assisting with the New York City Triathlon that had more than fifteen hundred race participants bicycling across the upper level of the Henry Hudson Bridge without incident. The Bronx-bound upper level of the bridge was closed to vehicular traffic at 5:30 am and was reopened at 10:50 am.

payload.description: New York City Triathlon with more than 1,500 race participants bicycling across the upper level of the Henry Hudson Bridge. Bronx-bound upper level closed to vehicular traffic from 5:30 am to 10:50 am.

payload.description: VN-X4 VNB Safety Fence project with budget $40.0 million. Awarded at $34.5 million reflecting good bid savings.

tool_args.label: Safety improvements from engineering projects

tool_args.label: MTA B&T workforce demographics June 2021
tool_args.raw_text: As of June 30, 2021, MTA Bridges and Tunnels' workforce included 1,147 total employees. Females represented 21% (238) of the total workforce. Minorities represented 57% (654) of the total workforce.

tool_args.label: Capital commitments year-to-date July 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Year-to-date, 59 commitments totaling $106.1 million were made, against a plan of 48 commitments with a total value of $116.5 million.

tool_args.label: Capital close-outs year-to-date August 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Year-to-date 153 task level close-outs have been achieved totaling $501.5 million, against a year-to-date goal of 143 tasks totaling approximately $1 billion.
